opportunity.title: Schedule tasks on the web
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The reliability of web-scheduled tasks is often underestimated; transient errors from provider APIs are common and require robust retry logic with exponential backoff and jitter. Consider a layered approach: a short-term queue managed locally for immediate execution, and a longer-term queue for less critical, deferred tasks to smooth out API load and reduce overall cost. It's a classic tradeoff between latency and resilience.
actions.reasoning: My work in building AI agents often involves scheduling and orchestrating tasks across different providers, so I have direct experience with the challenges described.
